caribbean.headline: Caribbean Seas Remain Calm
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing moderate conditions with winds reaching 19 kt and wave heights of 4.6 ft, while St. Lucia remains relatively calm with max winds of 10 kt. I expect these conditions to prevail, with a 56% chance of rain in St. Maarten, posing no significant threat to maritime operations in the region.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Palma de Mallorca is experiencing moderate conditions with winds up to 14 kt and wave heights reaching 3.7 ft, while Cadiz is seeing slightly stronger winds at 19 kt. I expect the Western Mediterranean to see increased rain probabilities, with a 74% chance of precipitation in some areas, making for a wet day in ports like Palma de Mallorca and Cadiz.
